overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city street during golden hour. The scene features wet reflective pavement, moderate vehicle traffic, scattered pedestrians, and towering skyscrapers with elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts

events.description: pedestrian in red tank top passes close to camera on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath a building with red neon columns, passing illuminated vending machines

notable_agents.action: walking past camera wearing a red tank top and shorts

entered.detail: building facade with vertical red neon light strips and orange upper section
purple and yellow illuminated vending machine with digital display
green vending machine with red signage and illuminated front
curved concrete elevated highway structure with support pillars
cluster of tall modern glass towers reflecting golden hour sunlight
metal barrier separating the sidewalk from the street traffic

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered urban sidewalk with a distinctive red neon-lit building on the left. The wet concrete reflects the neon lights and golden sunset. Vending machines line the wall while moderate traffic flows on the right, and futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance beneath an elevated highway ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with construction barriers and digital advertising

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into a more open area with construction barriers and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past construction barriers, approaching the intersection with increasing openness to the sky

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing and conversing near a red and white construction barrier

entered.detail: tall digital advertisement screen displaying a beverage commercial with a woman's face
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking part of the sidewalk
cylindrical tower with multiple stacked holographic advertisement displays

segments.scene_description: Moving past the covered section into a more open sidewalk area with construction barriers and digital advertising. The elevated highway ramp looms closer overhead while pedestrians gather near the barriers. The scene transitions from sheltered to exposed as the camera approaches the wide intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with yellow zebra crossing and surrounding megastructures

events.description: stepping onto the wide yellow striped crosswalk and entering the open intersection
camera tilts upward to look at the elevated highway structure and surrounding skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection via the yellow crosswalk, pausing to look up at the architecture, then continuing along the street

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes on dark asphalt
small hovering aerial vehicle with advertisement floating between buildings
tall pole with traffic signals and attached red banners

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide urban intersection via the yellow zebra crossing, surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers bathed in golden hour light. The camera looks up to reveal the massive elevated highway ramp overhead and a floating advertisement blimp. After crossing, the view opens to show palm-lined streets with flowing traffic and futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered, neon-lit urban corridor into a vast, sun-drenched city intersection. It begins along a covered sidewalk where wet concrete reflects the glow of a red neon building and nearby vending machines, while traffic flows beneath a distant elevated highway. As the camera moves forward, the shelter gives way to an open sidewalk filled with construction barriers and digital advertisements, bringing the massive highway ramp closer overhead. The scene then expands as the camera crosses a yellow zebra crossing, tilting upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and a floating advertisement blimp bathed in golden hour light. Finally, the view opens onto a wide street lined with palm trees and futuristic architecture as the camera completes its transition into the heart of the city.
